# Rover

> Turn any web interface into an AI agent. DOM-native SDK that reads the real DOM, plans actions, and executes them directly in the browser — clicks, forms, navigation — with sub-second latency and zero infrastructure.

Built by RTRVR AI. Works on websites, browser extensions, Electron apps, or anywhere there's a DOM.

## Embed on a website (one line)

<script src="https://rover.rtrvr.ai/embed.js" data-site-id="YOUR_SITE_ID" data-public-key="pk_site_YOUR_PUBLIC_KEY" data-allowed-domains="yourdomain.com"></script>

## npm

npm install @rtrvr-ai/rover
import { boot, shutdown } from '@rtrvr-ai/rover';
boot({ siteId: '...', publicKey: 'pk_site_...', allowedDomains: ['yourdomain.com'] });

## AI-Ready URLs

Any Rover-enabled page can be queried by AI agents:
https://example.com?rover=book%20a%20flight
https://example.com?rover_shortcut=checkout_flow
No MCP servers, tool definitions, or browser automation tools needed.

## JS API

rover.send(text) — send a task to Rover
rover.open() / rover.close() — toggle chat panel
rover.show() / rover.hide() — toggle widget visibility
rover.newTask() / rover.endTask() — task lifecycle
rover.registerTool(def, handler) — register client-side tools
rover.on(event, handler) — subscribe to events (ready, status, error)
rover.identify({ name, email }) — set visitor identity
rover.getState() — get runtime state
rover.update(config) — update config without reboot
